response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly at re:cinq, where he contributes to Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators and agentic workflows. While his AI-specific experience is less explicit than required, his technical leadership, cloud platform exposure, and open-source contributions suggest adaptability. The role's emphasis on customer-facing technical leadership and production-grade AI systems may require deeper GenAI expertise, but his background warrants further discussion.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and full-stack development experience, including recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks.
Extensive cloud and DevOps exposure (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker) with a focus on scalable, production-grade systems.
Strong open-source contributions and mentorship, demonstrating collaboration and knowledge-sharing skills.
concerns: Explicit GenAI/RAG/vector database experience is not clearly detailed in the resume, despite recent AI-agent work.
Lacks a Master's/PhD in AI/CS (preferred qualification) and may require upskilling in LLM performance metrics.
Customer-facing technical leadership experience is implied but not directly highlighted in the resume.
